vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow-

triage_decision.reason: The backup gshadow file had incorrect permissions (0000) which could allow unauthorized access. The remediation is to set proper permissions via chmod u-xwrs,g-xwrs,o-xwrt.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Incorrect file permissions; Potential unauthorized access; Backup file exposure
